*[UnnecessaryFinal](https://errorprone.info/bugpattern/UnnecessaryFinal):* Since Java 8, it's been unnecessary to make local variables and parameters `final` for use in lambdas or anonymous classes. Marking them as `final` is weakly discouraged, as it adds a fair amount of noise for minimal benefit. --- ```suggestion public final void addListener( ThreadCompleteListener listener) { ``` ---
